sql_array: CREATE TABLE TestData (id INT, value VARCHAR(20) NULL, created_at TIMESTAMP NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP);
INSERT INTO TestData (id, value) VALUES (1, '100'), (2, '200'), (3, NULL);
SELECT DB.DBA.REPL_CREATE_SNAPSHOT_SUB(REPL_SERVER_NAME('localhost:1121'), (SELECT value FROM TestData WHERE id = 1) * 10, 1);
CREATE TABLE OtherData (id INT, foreign_id INT, description VARCHAR(50));
INSERT INTO OtherData (id, foreign_id, description) VALUES (1, 1, 'First'), (2, 2, NULL);
SELECT DB.DBA.REPL_CREATE_SNAPSHOT_SUB(REPL_SERVER_NAME('localhost:1121'), value * 2, (SELECT MAX(id) FROM OtherData WHERE foreign_id IS NULL));
SELECT value * (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM OtherData WHERE foreign_id = id) FROM TestData HAVING COUNT(value) > 1;
CREATE TABLE BoundaryData (low_val INT, high_val INT);
SELECT DB.DBA.REPL_CREATE_SNAPSHOT_SUB(REPL_SERVER_NAME('localhost:1121'), (SELECT high_val FROM BoundaryData WHERE low_val = 1) * (NULLIF(id, 0)), 2) FROM TestData WHERE value IS NOT NULL;
SELECT (CASE WHEN COUNT(value) = 0 THEN NULL ELSE DB.DBA.REPL_CREATE_SNAPSHOT_SUB(REPL_SERVER_NAME('localhost:1121'), (SELECT AVG(id) FROM TestData) * 2.0, 1) END) FROM TestData;
